English: (What was Mr. DeLite's wallet doing there...?)

Japanese: ‥‥ベツに、おかしくねえだろ。
English: ...Anyway, there's nothing weird about that.

Japanese: あの会社の社員なんだから。
English: After all, he works there.

Japanese: しゃ‥‥社員？ 優作さんが、ですか‥‥？
English: He... works there? You mean... Mr. DeLite?

Japanese: だってよォ。サイフの中に コイツが入ってたから。
English: Sure. Here, take a look at this. It's right there in his wallet.

Japanese: このカードは‥‥？
English: What's this card?

Japanese: バイト先の警備会社の キーカードだよ。
English: It's a key card for the security company.

Japanese: シリアル番号が入ってるから、 まちがいないぜ。
English: Hey! It's got a serial number on it right there. There's no mistake about it.

Japanese: おまえのアルバイト先‥‥ “警備会社”だったよな。
English: You said you were working part-time at a "security company", right?

Japanese: そうだぜ。‥‥なんだよ、 コワいカオしちゃってさあ！
English: That's right. ...Wh-Why are you making that scary face?

Japanese: （なんか、引っかかる‥‥ “警備会社”‥‥）
English: ("Security company", huh... Something's not quite secure about Larry working there...)

Japanese: （それに、このキーカード‥‥ 詳しい情報がほしいな）
English: (I need to find out as much as I can about this key card...)

Japanese: 証拠品《キーカード》のデータを 法廷記録にファイルした。
English: Key Card added to the Court Record.

Japanese: 脅迫状に書いてある《ＫＢ警備》 ‥‥おまえ、知ってるんだな！
English: KB Security, the company in the blackmail letter! You know about it!?

Japanese: なにしろ、バイト先だからなァ。 今もオレ、キンム中だし。
English: That's where I work, yeah. In fact, I'm on the job right now.

Japanese: あれ。‥‥じゃあ、どうして ここにいるんですか？
English: Huh...? So what are you doing here then?

Japanese: はは。社長が今、ルスだから。 チョイと一休み‥‥自主的に。
English: Well, the boss is away right now, and you know what mice do when the cat's away...

Japanese: “一休み”って‥‥ どこにあるんだよ、その会社。
English: ...Yes, yes. *sigh* Anyway, how far away is this company?

Japanese: そうだな‥‥クルマでスッ飛ばして ３０分ぐらい、だったかな。
English: Lemme see... About 30 minutes by car, I guess... Well, if you fly down the road, anyway.

Japanese: このマンション‥‥高菱屋百貨店 の、すぐそばにあるよな。
English: Hmm. Well, this apartment building is pretty close to Lordly Tailor, right?

Japanese: ＫＢ警備に行って、帰ってきたら １時間かかっちゃうね。
English: And it would take roughly an hour to go from here to KB Security and back.

Japanese: 天杉　優作が、犯行時刻のころ、 ＫＢ警備に行っていたら‥‥？
English: If Ron DeLite was at KB Security when the robbery occurred, then...
Whoa...!

Japanese: 倉院のツボ、盗めないよ‥‥。
English: Then he couldn't have stolen the Sacred Urn!

Japanese: オマエ、もう２６才だろ。
English: You're 26 years old, right?

Japanese: そろそろ、しっかり生き方を 見つめなおしたほうがいいぜ！
English: Don't you think it's about time you took a long, hard look at your life?

Japanese: 女の子にフラれるために生きてる アルバイトの警備員に言われると、
English: Coming from a guy who can only brag about how many times he's been rejected...

Japanese: ‥‥逆に重くのしかかるなあ。 そのセリフ。
English: I find that kind of... ironic.

Japanese: お！　おぼえてるぜ！ マヨイちゃんのネエちゃんだろ！
English: Hey, I remember her! That's Maya's big sister!

Japanese: わあ！　おぼえてて くれたんですか！
English: Wow! You really do remember!

Japanese: 美女よなあ。姉妹そろってさあ！
English: Yeah, who could forget! A couple of gorgeous sisters! Hubba hubba!

Japanese: ビジョだって、なるほどくん！
English: You hear that, Nick! Gorgeous!

Japanese: （そういえば、 矢張を弁護したとき‥‥）
English: (Oh yeah... That's right. When I defended Larry...)

Japanese: （千尋さん、まだ 生きていたんだっけな‥‥）
English: (Mia was still alive...)

Japanese: しばらく会わないうちに グッとかわいくなったね！
English: Wow! You're even cuter than the last time I saw you.

Japanese: え！　ホントですか！
English: Oh, really!?

Japanese: もお、２年前とはベツジンだぜ。 なあ、成歩堂！
English: Yeah, you look totally different than two years ago. Don't you think, Nick?

Japanese: （近くにいるせいか、あんまり 変わったようには見えないな）
English: (Maybe it's 'cause we're always together, but she looks pretty much the same to me.)

Japanese: おッ！　カワイイ‥‥
English: Oh! What a cutie!

Japanese: 成歩堂！　この子、 アンタのなんなのさ？
English: Hey, Nick! So what's the deal between you and this girl?

Japanese: あ。あたしのイトコです。 綾里　春美っていうんですよ。
English: Hey! That's my cousin! Her name is Pearl Fey.

Japanese: ハルミちゃん、か‥‥ ザンネンだなあ。
English: Pearl, huh... Too bad.

Japanese: オレ、同じ名前のカノジョは 作らないルールだから。
English: Never date two girls with the same name... That's one rule I can't break.

Japanese: （それ以前に、春美ちゃん ９才だぞ‥‥）
English: (...I'd think the fact that she's only 9 years old would break some rule somewhere!)

Japanese: お！　アマいマスクの下に、 セクシー美女の予感！
English: I just thought of something! What if it's actually a hot chick under that costume!

Japanese: いやいや。オトコだよ、中身は。
English: Forget about it. It's a guy, trust me.

Japanese: バカ！　つまんねえモノ 見せるんじゃねえ！
English: Man! You're killin' my buzz, dude!

Japanese: ‥‥わかりやすいヒトだね、 ヤッパリさん‥‥。
English: Boy, talk about someone who has a one track mind...

Japanese: いやー、やっぱり イイよなあ、マレカちゃん。
English: That Dessie is one awesome lady alright!

Japanese: ひさしぶりに、マジで ホレちまいそうだぜ。
English: It's been a long time since I've felt this way... I think I'm really in love this time!

Japanese: ひさしぶり、ですかあ‥‥
English: A long time, huh?

Japanese: あ！　モチロン、 マヨイちゃんはベツよ！
English: Yeah! Well, err... Except for what I feel for you, Maya!

Japanese: （もう、イミが わからないな、コイツは）
English: (I don't think even HE knows what he's saying anymore.)

Japanese: 成歩堂、オマエも 見習えよ、このオレをさ！
English: Even you could learn a few tricks from me, Nick!

Japanese: ‥‥たとえば、どのへんを？
English: ...Yeah? Like what?

Japanese: 見ろよ、オレのアタマ。 上ムキにトガってるだろ？
English: Look at my hair for example. It points up straight, right?

Japanese: なのに、オマエときたら。 いっつも、後ろムキにトガらせて。
English: But your hair, on the other hand, points backwards.

Japanese: ダメだよ、それじゃあ。 オトコなら、トップを目指せ！
English: That's no good at all, man! It's defeatist! You gotta aim high... for the stars!

Japanese: （は‥‥反論できない）
English: (I... I can't find a counter-argument to that...)

Japanese: 矢張。このヒトなんだけど‥‥
English: Larry, what about this person...?

Japanese: 知らね。
English: Beats me.

Japanese: （ここまでキョクタンな オトコだったかな‥‥）
English: (What the...? All of a sudden, he's got nothing to say...?)

Japanese: 矢張、これなんだけど。
English: Hey Larry, what about this?

Japanese: なんだよ。言いたいことが あったら、クチで言えよな。
English: What? If you've got something to say, then say it already!

Japanese: な、なんだコレ！　脅迫状って！
English: Huh...? A blackmail letter!?

Japanese: 何か、思い当たることでもあるか？
English: Do you know anything about this?

Japanese: な‥‥な、なんで知ってるんだよ！ エミコのことだろ！
English: Wh-Wha-What? I don't know anything about Alexis! And that's the truth!
Huh? What?

Japanese: お、お、お、お‥‥オマエ、 トモダチじゃなかったのかよ！
English: I-I can't believe you'd do this to me! I thought you were my friend!

Japanese: そんな‥‥ ゴヒャクマンエンって、オマエ！
English: Fifty thousand dollars! I don't have that kind of money!

Japanese: い‥‥いやいやいや！　それは 天杉　優作が受け取ったものだぞ。
English: No, no, you don't understand! This blackmail letter was sent to Ron DeLite!

Japanese: えええッ！ ビックリさせるな！　バカ！
English: Wheeeew! Man, you scared me!! I almost had a heart attack, you idiot!

Japanese: どっちがだ！
English: Wait, I'm the idiot!?

Japanese: まぎらわしいぜ。“ＫＢ警備” なんて書いてあるからよォ。
English: Man, I was totally confused because it says, "KB Security" right on the envelope.

Japanese: ‥‥あの。 それがどうかしましたか？
English: Um, yeah... So what?

Japanese: ＫＢ警備会社って、オレが バイトしているトコだからさァ。
English: That's where I've got a part-time job! At KB Security!

Japanese: な‥‥なにィィィィッ！
English: Wh... Whaaaat!

Japanese: （ＫＢ警備について‥‥ 情報を引きずり出さないと！）
English: (Sounds like I should really find out some more about this KB Security company!)

Japanese: このキーカード、 まちがいなく‥‥？
English: So you're sure about this key card?

Japanese: ああ。そいつはウチの ビルで使われているカードだぜ。
English: Yup. That's the key card they use at the building I work in.

Japanese: シリアル番号によると‥‥ 社長室のカードだな。
English: According to the serial number, this one is for the CEO's office.

Japanese: 部屋に入るときに必要でさ。 使うと、記録が残るんだ。
English: You need it to get into that room, and every time you use that card, it leaves a record.

Japanese: 記録が‥‥残る‥‥？
English: It leaves a record?

Japanese: ダレが何時に部屋を出入りしたか、 バッチリってワケ。
English: Yeah, it tells you exactly who entered the room and when.

Japanese: 矢張！　その記録だけど‥‥
English: Larry! I need that data...!

Japanese: おおっと！　悪いケド、外部の 人間にデータは見せられねえぜ。
English: Whoa! Slow down, man! Sorry, but that data is off limits to outsiders.

Japanese: クビになったら、まれかちゃんと 遊ぶ計画がパアだ。
English: If I lost this job, I'd never have a chance with Dessie...

Japanese: （こういうとき、 弁護士ってヨワいよな‥‥）
English: (It's times like these when I wish lawyers weren't so powerless...)

Japanese: 証拠品《キーカード》のデータを 書きなおした。
English: Key Card updated in the Court Record.

Japanese: 矢張。倉院の里の 秘宝なんだけど‥‥
English: Larry, this is one of the treasures from Kurain Village...

Japanese: バカか、成歩堂！
English: Be serious, Nick!

Japanese: オレ、そういうジミなヤツには まったくキョーミねえの！
English: I couldn't care less about mystic mumbo jumbo stuff!

Japanese: あ！　モチロン、 マヨイちゃんはベツだぜ！
English: Ah! Of course Maya is a different story!

Japanese: （このオトコはいったい ナニを言ってるのだろう‥‥）
English: (Talk about your mixed messages...)

Japanese: まさか‥‥サイフの中身には 手をつけてないだろうな？
English: You didn't touch anything in the wallet, did you?

Japanese: バカなコト 言ってんじゃねえよ！
English: Hey man, be serious!

Japanese: オレの狙ってるエモノは こっちだって！
English: You know what I was interested in!

Japanese: （怪人☆仮面マスク、あやうし！ ‥‥だな）
English: (If Mask☆DeMasque doesn't look out, he's gonna be the victim of a robbery himself!)

Japanese: うおおおおお！ ダレよコレ！　ダレよ成歩堂！
English: WHOA! WHO is this! Come on, man, don't hold out on me!

Japanese: い、いやいや。 ‥‥知らなきゃいいよ、ベツに。
English: Forget about it. It's on a need to know basis and you don't need to kn--

Japanese: よくねぇよ、成歩堂！ オマエだって知ってるだろ！
English: Hey now! I thought we were pals!

Japanese: オレ、黒いノースリーブでメガネの オンナに、めっぽうヨワいんだよ！
English: I got a MAJOR thing for girls with black sleeveless shirts and glasses!

Japanese: そんなの知るかよ！
English: How do you know that!?

Japanese: これで、オレンジ色の手帳でも 持っていたら、も。たまんねえぜ！
English: And if they have an orange- colored memo pad, I really lose my cool!

Japanese: （‥‥本当に知らないのか？ 霧緒さんのこと‥‥）
English: (He has to be making that up... He can't really know Adrian... Can he...?)

Japanese: ‥‥これについて、 何か思いつくことはないか？
English: ...What about this? Does anything come to mind?

Japanese: オレ、警備員だからさあ。
English: Listen, I'm a security guard.

Japanese: こんなトコで、アブラ売ってる ワケにはいかねえのよ。
English: I'm not here to sell you juicy bits of info and chew the fat, man.

Japanese: （２年前はマンジュウを 売ってたくせに‥‥）
English: (Funny, you had no qualms about selling Samurai Dogs just 2 years ago.)
